comingsoon.title: Lyra Tech
comingsoon.subtitle: Your vision in code
comingsoon.description: We are preparing something epic. We're going to revolutionize technology... and you'll be part of it.

heroHome.title: We build solutions that understand your business
heroHome.subtitle: From problem to implementation, we walk with you.

aboutUsIntro.description: At LyraTech we don't just write code, we create experiences that connect, inspire and generate real value. We are a multidisciplinary team passionate about solving complex problems with elegant and scalable solutions.
aboutUsIntro.feat1Desc: We love what we do and it shows in every line of code
aboutUsIntro.feat2Desc: Every detail matters to create exceptional experiences
aboutUsIntro.feat3Desc: We always seek the next great technological solution
aboutUsIntro.feat4Desc: We don't settle for good, we pursue the extraordinary

visionMission.visionDesc: To be leaders in digital solutions that understand businesses, improve quality of life, and transform industries through technological innovation, creating a positive and lasting impact on every project.
visionMission.missionDesc: We develop tailored technological solutions that connect ideas with results. We focus on listening, designing with purpose, and delivering products that add value from day one, accompanying our clients every step of the way.

teamSection.title: Our team
teamSection.desc1: Visionary strategist who turns ideas into high-impact digital products.
teamSection.desc2: Orchestrates processes and teams so every project ships on time with excellence.
teamSection.desc3: Architect of solid, scalable, and cutting-edge technological solutions.
teamSection.desc4: Connects the Lyratech brand with the world through creative strategies and data.
teamSection.desc5: Ensures the financial health and sustainable growth of the team.

faqContact.q1: Do you work with startups or only large companies?
faqContact.a1: We work with all types of companies, from early-stage startups to large corporations. We adapt to the size and needs of each client.
faqContact.q2: How long do you take to respond?
faqContact.a2: We respond within 24 business hours. For urgent projects, we have priority support channels to ensure a quick response.
faqContact.q3: Do you offer maintenance and support after delivering the project?
faqContact.a3: Yes, we offer post-delivery maintenance and support plans to ensure your product always works optimally and stays up to date.
faqContact.q4: Can I request changes once development has started?
faqContact.a4: Yes, we work with agile methodologies that allow changes to be incorporated during development. We evaluate each request and integrate it in an organized way.

heroContact.subtitle: Do you have an incredible idea? We're here to turn it into reality. Tell us what you need and let's start this journey together.

heroPortfolio.subtitle: Every project is a story of innovation, creativity, and exceptional results that have transformed businesses.

heroServices.subtitle: From idea to launch, we build complete solutions that drive your business into the digital future.

heroAboutUs.subtitle: Every project is an opportunity to create something incredible. Meet the people who transform ideas into digital realities that impact and transcend.

aboutUsHome.descriptionCard1: At LyraTech, we create software that inspires, combining design, speed, and functionality. Born from a passionate team, we are now a reference in digital solutions that exceed expectations and drive real results.
aboutUsHome.descriptionCard2: From our first projects to today, we have grown alongside our clients, perfecting every line of code and every design. Our experience drives us to innovate without losing the essence that makes us unique.

servicesHome.title: Tailored Solutions
servicesHome.description: Your ideas deserve more than just code. That’s why we created LyraTech: an agile, design-focused approach built to take your digital products to the next level.
servicesHome.serviceItems1_1: Technology and stack adapted to your project

portafolioHome.title: SUCCESSFUL PROJECTS
portafolioHome.description: Each project is a success story. Discover how we have transformed ideas into digital solutions that exceed expectations.
portafolioHome.finnova: Personal finance app that centralizes money management and savings in one platform.
portafolioHome.indeleble: Corporate website for a marketing agency
portafolioHome.csv: Corporate website for a logistics services company
portafolioHome.plenusHopeMun: Model United Nations website for educational institution
portafolioHome.verderaiz: Website and blog with dashboard for environmental organization
portafolioHome.callToActionTitle: Ready for the next successful project?
portafolioHome.callToActionText: Let’s transform your idea into a digital solution that exceeds all expectations.

helpAndSupportHome.title: Help and Support
helpAndSupportHome.subtitle: We are here to assist you every step of the way. Our technical support team is available whenever you need it.
helpAndSupportHome.descriptionWhatsApp: Get immediate assistance from our technical support team
helpAndSupportHome.descriptionMail: Send your detailed inquiry and receive a complete response
helpAndSupportHome.descriptionPhone: Speak directly with our technical experts

footer.description: We create extraordinary software with flawless design, superior speed, and perfect functionality. Your digital success is our mission.
